\tzpentry{ID4567}{System Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4567 introduces System Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \frac{d\vec{L}_{\text{system}}}{dt} + \frac{d\vec{L}_{\text{field}}}{dt} = \vec{\tau}_{\text{external}} \end{equation}
